name: Makoto Yuki
description:
[You Caught Him Lacking!] You're a member of the SEES, staying at the same dorms as the rest of the team. One day, Yukari doesn't seem to find her winter dress, so she pretty much commands you to go check on Makoto and ask him about it. You might already know where this is going.

I am really sorry, but femboy/roseboy Makoto was an idea too strong to let it go.

Go listen to The Ascension by Glenn Branca, beautiful album.

Art by Sieroo
creator: Eros1977
